summary:
I built the follower execution pipeline, guard system, and trader dashboard for Summit, a SaaS crypto trading platform. This work spanned transactional outbox messaging, live SL/TP on multiple exchange APIs, a layered risk guard with independent per-follow configuration, and a full notification stack (in-app and Telegram). I also shipped position lifecycle management, admin analytics, and user-facing features like onboarding and leaderboards.

On the systems side, I developed a multi-version HID emulation firmware for the ESP32-S3, culminating in v13 with fire-and-forget event injection and an 8×8 matrix variant. I wrote a Windows kernel-mode input filter driver that captures and injects keyboard/mouse events, complete with a push-style listener API, integration tests, and per-event block predicates.

I conducted AI research with mixture-of-experts and ensemble architectures for crypto price prediction, running hundreds of experiments and pushing accuracy to new highs. For Android, I engineered an on-device LLM assistant with sub-agent delegation and tool routing, and I integrated multiple TTS engines with custom pitch, intonation, and licensing for commercial use. I also built a computer vision pipeline for poker hand recognition and a YOLO-based labeling tool.

Additionally, I continued work on the Intag file-tagging tool, Freqtrade strategies, Telegram bot infrastructure for trade monitoring, autonomous coding tooling, and an AutoHotKey alternative.

items.title: Follower execution and guard system
items.description: Built the follower copy-trading pipeline with transactional outbox, live SL/TP, layered risk guards, notifications, and a redesigned trader dashboard.

items.title: Minimal input automation tool
items.description: Implemented a lightweight AutoHotKey alternative with a scenario engine, stateless themes, and interception driver integration.

items.title: HID emulation firmware v13
items.description: Released v13 firmware with fire-and-forget event injection and an 8×8 matrix variant, improving USB HID throughput.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Delivered a KMDF keyboard/mouse filter driver with a push-style listener API, integration tests, and relaxed SDDL for easier deployment.

items.title: File tagging Explorer extension
items.description: Fixed desktop.ini encoding to correctly render non-ASCII characters in Windows Explorer.

items.title: Android TTS engine expansion
items.description: Added TeraTTS and XTTS v2 engines, pitch and intonation controls, and cleaned up licensing for commercial distribution.

items.title: Firmware fixes and new variant
items.description: Fixed a device disconnection bug and drafted a new v13s8x8 firmware variant for the matrix layout.

items.title: CI and release pipeline overhaul
items.description: Restructured CI into separate build and store-publish workflows and fixed changelog generation.

items.title: E-ink map and knowledge base
items.description: Optimized the map renderer for Apple Silicon and built a knowledge base app with taxonomy browser for the custom e-ink reader.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Ran hundreds of experiments with mixture-of-experts and ensemble models, achieving new best accuracy on spike regression.

items.title: On-device LLM assistant
items.description: Architected a sub-agent delegation system, tool-routing pipeline, and background processing for a pocket LLM with phone-use capabilities.

items.title: Aim assist overlay rewrite
items.description: Replaced the rendering overlay with a D3D11 composition engine and added a YOLO-confidence-gated autofire system.

items.title: Store publishing stabilisation
items.description: Battled Partner Center API quirks by switching to PowerShell REST with exponential backoff and finalised the Microsoft Store submission pipeline.

items.title: Graph-powered code intelligence engine
items.description: Built Jaxon, a knowledge graph indexer with tree-sitter parsers, DI registration detection, and MCP tools for AI agent integration.

items.title: Computer vision poker hand capture
items.description: Completed a pipeline for detecting hands, board cards, and blinds from online poker screenshots, achieving over 99% accuracy.

items.title: Algorithmic trading strategy development
items.description: Developed and backtested dozens of trading strategies (Fenix, NASOS) with hyperopt optimisation, targeting high Sharpe ratios and low drawdown.

items.title: Freqtrade Telegram monitoring bot
items.description: Built a multi-bot Telegram interface with daily profit tracking, a web dashboard, and Docker deployment for Freqtrade.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding tooling
items.description: Extended the multi-session AI coding framework with squash-merge workflows, completion tracking, and Git rules configuration.

items.title: Content assistant bots
items.description: Created Telegram bot assistants for content summarisation, multi-target forwarding, and image deduplication.

items.title: Early Freqtrade strategy work
items.description: Experimented with strategy optimisation and custom indicators for algorithmic trading.

items.title: Windows Explorer tagging tool
items.description: Developed a file-tagging shell extension with CLI support and UI polish.
